Etrit Berisha.bio: One of the most experienced Albanian footballers of his generation, Etrit Berisha has been a stalwart between the posts for over a decade. His career has spanned top Italian clubs including Lazio and Atalanta before moving to Scandinavia, and he has been a pillar of Albanian goalkeeping through two major tournament qualifications.
Etrit Berisha.playingStyle: Experienced, commanding goalkeeper with excellent shot-stopping ability, strong positioning, and the vocal leadership to organize his defensive line effectively
keyStrengths: Composure under pressure in big matches
Etrit Berisha.worldCup2026Role: Veteran first-choice goalkeeper whose experience across multiple European leagues gives Albania reliability and calm in their historic first World Cup appearance
Etrit Berisha.notableFact: Was Albania's starting goalkeeper during their historic Euro 2016 campaign, their first-ever major tournament, where he earned praise for several crucial saves

Thomas Strakosha.bio: A talented goalkeeper who rose to prominence during a long stint at Lazio in Serie A, where he was the starting keeper for several seasons. Born in Greece to Albanian parents, Strakosha chose to represent Albania and has been a key figure in the national team setup as a reliable backup and competitor for the number one shirt.
Thomas Strakosha.playingStyle: Technically proficient goalkeeper with excellent reflexes, good distribution skills, and the ability to command his area during set pieces and crosses
keyStrengths: Distribution and ability to start attacks
Experience in high-pressure Serie A matches
Thomas Strakosha.worldCup2026Role: Strong backup goalkeeper who provides genuine competition for the starting spot; his Serie A pedigree means Albania have no drop-off in quality if called upon
Thomas Strakosha.notableFact: Made over 150 appearances for Lazio in Serie A and was part of the squad that competed in the UEFA Champions League, giving him elite-level European experience

Simon Simoni.bio: A young and promising goalkeeper who represents the future of Albanian goalkeeping. At just 21, Simoni has already caught the eye of scouts with his performances in the German second division with Kaiserslautern, and his selection for the World Cup squad reflects Albania's confidence in his development trajectory.
Simon Simoni.playingStyle: Athletic, modern goalkeeper with impressive height, quick reactions, and the willingness to play out from the back that suits contemporary tactical demands
keyStrengths: Confidence playing with the ball at his feet
Simon Simoni.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper gaining invaluable World Cup experience at a young age; his inclusion signals Albania's investment in developing the next generation of talent
Simon Simoni.notableFact: At 195cm tall, he is one of the tallest players in the Albanian squad and has been developing his craft in the competitive German 2. Bundesliga with Kaiserslautern

Berat Djimsiti.bio: A cornerstone of Atalanta's remarkable rise in Serie A and European competition, Djimsiti has become one of the most respected Albanian players in European football. His consistency, intelligence, and reading of the game have made him a fixture in both Atalanta's and Albania's defensive setup for nearly a decade.
Berat Djimsiti.playingStyle: Intelligent, composed center-back who reads the game exceptionally well, excels in positional play, and contributes with clean ball progression from the back line
keyStrengths: Exceptional reading of the game and positioning
Experience in European competition with Atalanta
Berat Djimsiti.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back and defensive leader whose experience in Atalanta's sophisticated tactical system provides Albania with a world-class defensive foundation
Berat Djimsiti.notableFact: Won the Europa League with Atalanta in 2024, becoming one of the few Albanian players to win a major European trophy, capping a remarkable journey with the Bergamo club

Ardian Ismajli.bio: A strong, no-nonsense center-back who earned his move to Serie A through consistent performances in Portuguese and Italian football. Ismajli's physicality and aerial dominance have made him a dependable presence in Albania's backline, and his move to Torino cemented his status as one of Albania's most valuable defenders.
Ardian Ismajli.playingStyle: Physically imposing center-back who excels in aerial duels, aggressive marking, and providing a solid defensive foundation through disciplined positioning and strength
Ardian Ismajli.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back alongside Djimsiti, forming a Serie A-hardened defensive partnership that gives Albania the solidity needed to compete at the World Cup level
Ardian Ismajli.notableFact: Developed through Empoli's academy and was instrumental in their Serie A survival campaigns before earning his transfer to Torino, proving himself among Italy's most consistent defenders

Marash Kumbulla.bio: Born in Italy to Albanian parents, Kumbulla burst onto the scene as one of Serie A's most exciting young defenders at Hellas Verona before earning a move to Roma. Though injuries have slowed his trajectory, his talent remains undeniable, and his move to La Liga with Mallorca has revitalized his career.
Marash Kumbulla.playingStyle: Technically gifted, ball-playing center-back who combines composure on the ball with solid defensive instincts and the ability to step out and carry the ball from deep positions
keyStrengths: Ball-playing ability and composure in possession
Marash Kumbulla.worldCup2026Role: Versatile defensive depth option who can slot into multiple systems; his technical quality on the ball gives Albania an alternative approach to building from the back
Marash Kumbulla.notableFact: Was born and raised in Italy and played through the Italian youth national teams before committing his senior international career to Albania, representing the strong Italian-Albanian football connection

Arlind Ajeti.bio: A veteran defender and former Albanian national team captain, Ajeti has been a loyal servant to Albanian football throughout his career. His experience spans multiple European leagues, and his leadership qualities have made him a respected figure in the squad throughout Albania's qualifying campaigns.
Arlind Ajeti.playingStyle: Experienced, combative center-back who leads by example with aggressive defending, solid aerial ability, and the organizational skills to marshal the backline
Arlind Ajeti.worldCup2026Role: Veteran defensive presence providing leadership and squad depth; his years of international experience make him a valuable mentor for the younger defenders in the squad
Arlind Ajeti.notableFact: Has captained the Albanian national team on numerous occasions and was part of the historic squad that qualified for Euro 2016, Albania's first major tournament

Klisman Cake.bio: A young center-back who has been developing his career across Eastern European football. Cake's physicality and defensive awareness have earned him call-ups to the senior national team, and he represents part of Albania's effort to build defensive depth for the future.
Klisman Cake.playingStyle: Strong, physical center-back who relies on his defensive positioning, aerial prowess, and willingness to engage in physical duels to win the ball
keyStrengths: Willingness to compete in physical battles
Klisman Cake.worldCup2026Role: Young defensive depth option gaining exposure at the highest level; his inclusion provides Albania with additional cover in the center-back positions
Klisman Cake.notableFact: Playing in the Russian Premier League has tested him against some of the most physical strikers in European football, helping develop his robust defensive style

Elseid Hysaj.bio: Albania's most-capped outfield player and the nation's most decorated defender, Hysaj has spent the majority of his career in Serie A with Napoli and Lazio. His consistency, tactical intelligence, and ability to perform in the biggest matches have made him one of Albania's greatest ever players.
Elseid Hysaj.playingStyle: Defensively disciplined, tactically intelligent fullback who positions himself excellently, rarely gets beaten one-on-one, and provides reliable width and overlapping runs when his team has possession
keyStrengths: Consistency and reliability over a long career
Versatility to play on either flank
Elseid Hysaj.worldCup2026Role: Veteran right-back and squad leader whose near-100 caps and years in Serie A provide Albania with invaluable experience and defensive stability in their World Cup debut
Elseid Hysaj.notableFact: Has spent over a decade in Serie A with Napoli and Lazio, amassing well over 200 appearances in Italy's top flight, making him one of the most experienced Albanian players in a top-five European league

Ivan Balliu.bio: Born in Albania but raised in Spain, Balliu has built a solid career in La Liga with Rayo Vallecano. His understanding of Spanish football's tactical demands and his reliable defending have earned him a role in the Albanian national team as a dependable fullback option.
Ivan Balliu.playingStyle: Technically sound right-back with good tactical awareness developed in La Liga, consistent crossing ability, and solid one-on-one defending against tricky wingers
Ivan Balliu.worldCup2026Role: Backup right-back who provides experienced cover and tactical versatility; his years in La Liga give Albania a player accustomed to high-level football across different tactical setups
Ivan Balliu.notableFact: Despite being born in Albania, he moved to Spain as a youngster and worked his way through the Spanish lower divisions before establishing himself in La Liga with Rayo Vallecano

Mario Mitaj.bio: One of Albania's most exciting young talents, Mitaj is a dynamic left-back who has quickly become a key player for the national team. His attacking prowess and ability to drive forward from deep positions have attracted interest from top European clubs and made him one of Albania's most valuable assets.
Mario Mitaj.playingStyle: Dynamic, attack-minded left-back with excellent pace, driving runs up the flank, quality crossing, and the energy to contribute at both ends of the pitch throughout the full match
keyStrengths: Pace and driving runs from left-back
Energy and stamina to cover the entire left flank
Mario Mitaj.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back and one of Albania's most dangerous attacking outlets; his pace and directness provide width and attacking threat that stretches opposition defenses
Mario Mitaj.notableFact: At just 22, he has already established himself as Albania's first-choice left-back and attracted attention from major European clubs with his dynamic attacking displays

Kristjan Asllani.bio: The crown jewel of Albanian football, Asllani is a supremely gifted midfielder who learned his craft at Inter Milan under Simone Inzaghi before moving to Besiktas. His elegance on the ball, passing range, and composure have drawn comparisons to some of Italy's finest deep-lying playmakers, and he represents Albania's brightest star.
Kristjan Asllani.playingStyle: Elegant, technically brilliant deep-lying playmaker with outstanding passing range, exceptional vision, and the composure to control the tempo of matches from the base of midfield
keyStrengths: Composure and technical quality under pressure
Ability to control the tempo and rhythm of matches
Kristjan Asllani.worldCup2026Role: Starting midfielder and the heartbeat of Albania's team; his ability to dictate play from deep positions is central to Albania's game plan and their hopes of competing with the world's best
Kristjan Asllani.notableFact: Trained at Inter Milan's academy and was understudy to Marcelo Brozovic, learning the regista role from one of the best before establishing himself as Albania's most valuable player

Ylber Ramadani.bio: A hardworking and reliable central midfielder who has been a consistent presence in the Albanian national team. Ramadani's tireless work rate, ball-winning ability, and tactical discipline have made him a crucial part of Albania's midfield setup throughout their qualifying campaigns.
Ylber Ramadani.playingStyle: Tenacious, box-to-box midfielder who combines relentless pressing and ball-winning with efficient passing and the positional discipline to shield the defense effectively
keyStrengths: Tireless work rate and pressing intensity
Ylber Ramadani.worldCup2026Role: Starting defensive midfielder who provides the engine room with energy and protection; his tireless running and tackling allow Albania's more creative players to express themselves
Ylber Ramadani.notableFact: Has been one of Albania's most consistent performers in recent qualifying campaigns, earning recognition for his ability to perform against technically superior opponents through sheer determination

Qazim Laci.bio: An experienced midfielder who has plied his trade across several European leagues, Laci brings intelligence, versatility, and a calm presence to Albania's midfield. His ability to read the game and deliver in crucial moments has made him a trusted member of the squad for years.
Qazim Laci.playingStyle: Intelligent, experienced central midfielder with good reading of the game, neat passing in tight spaces, and the tactical awareness to fill gaps and maintain team shape
keyStrengths: Game intelligence and reading of play
Qazim Laci.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield rotation option who provides tactical intelligence and reliability; ideal for managing games when Albania need to control tempo and protect a result
Qazim Laci.notableFact: Has represented Albania across multiple qualifying campaigns and major tournaments, becoming one of the most trusted players in the manager's squad rotation

Medon Berisha.bio: A rising young midfielder making his mark in Serie A with Lecce, Medon Berisha represents the next wave of Albanian football talent. His combination of physical presence, technical ability, and youthful energy has caught the eye of national team selectors as they build a squad for the future.
Medon Berisha.playingStyle: Dynamic young midfielder with good physical attributes, an eye for a forward pass, and the composure to handle the ball under pressure in competitive Serie A matches
keyStrengths: Composure on the ball in high-pressure situations
Medon Berisha.worldCup2026Role: Young midfield talent gaining World Cup experience; his energy and ability to play in Serie A demonstrate the quality of Albania's emerging generation of footballers
Medon Berisha.notableFact: At just 22, he has already broken into Serie A with Lecce and earned senior international recognition, part of a wave of talented young Albanian players emerging in Italian football

Adrion Pajaziti.bio: A promising young defensive midfielder who has been developing his career in Croatian football with Hajduk Split. Pajaziti's tenacity, tactical awareness, and ability to break up play have earned him early call-ups to the Albanian national team as part of their long-term squad development.
Adrion Pajaziti.playingStyle: Energetic, disciplined defensive midfielder who excels at breaking up opposition attacks, maintaining team structure, and providing a solid platform for the more creative players ahead
keyStrengths: Tactical discipline and team structure maintenance
Adrion Pajaziti.worldCup2026Role: Young defensive midfield option providing depth and energy; his inclusion reflects Albania's commitment to integrating young talent into their World Cup squad
Adrion Pajaziti.notableFact: Has been developing in the competitive Croatian league with Hajduk Split, one of the most storied clubs in Balkan football, gaining valuable experience in a demanding environment

Juljan Shehu.bio: A versatile central midfielder who has been carving out a career in Polish football with Widzew Lodz. Shehu's physical presence, box-to-box capability, and willingness to do the unglamorous work have earned him a place in Albania's expanded World Cup squad.
Juljan Shehu.playingStyle: Box-to-box midfielder with strong physical attributes, good stamina to cover large areas of the pitch, and the willingness to contribute at both ends of the field
keyStrengths: Willingness to work defensively and offensively
Juljan Shehu.worldCup2026Role: Midfield depth option who can provide fresh energy and physical presence off the bench; his versatility gives the coaching staff tactical flexibility in squad rotation
Juljan Shehu.notableFact: Has been building his career in the Polish Ekstraklasa, gaining experience in a competitive European league that tests both physical and technical capabilities

Nedim Bajrami.bio: Albania's creative talisman and the man who wears the iconic number 10 shirt, Bajrami is a gifted attacking midfielder with an eye for the spectacular. His technical quality, vision, and ability to produce moments of magic have made him Albania's most dangerous creative threat and a fan favorite.
Nedim Bajrami.playingStyle: Creative, left-footed attacking midfielder with superb technical ability, excellent set-piece delivery, and the vision to unlock defenses with incisive through balls and clever movement between the lines
Nedim Bajrami.worldCup2026Role: Starting number 10 and Albania's chief creative force; his ability to produce decisive moments of quality is central to Albania's hopes of creating chances against superior opponents
Nedim Bajrami.notableFact: Scored the fastest goal in European Championship history when he netted after just 23 seconds against Italy at Euro 2024, announcing Albania's presence on the biggest stage

Arber Hoxha.bio: A talented winger who has been a standout performer in Croatian football with Dinamo Zagreb. Hoxha's pace, directness, and ability to create from wide positions have made him an important attacking option for the Albanian national team in their quest for World Cup glory.
Arber Hoxha.playingStyle: Quick, direct winger who loves to take on defenders, deliver dangerous crosses, and create scoring opportunities through his pace and willingness to run at the opposition
keyStrengths: Pace and directness in one-on-one situations
Crossing ability and delivery from wide areas
Work rate and willingness to track back
Arber Hoxha.worldCup2026Role: Wide attacking option providing pace and directness from the left wing; his ability to stretch defenses and create chances from wide positions adds a crucial attacking dimension
Arber Hoxha.notableFact: Has been a regular contributor in European competition with Dinamo Zagreb, performing on some of the biggest stages in European club football

Myrto Uzuni.bio: A versatile and prolific forward who has scored goals wherever he has played, from Albania to Hungary to MLS. Uzuni's pace, movement, and finishing ability have made him one of Albania's most reliable goal threats, and his experience across multiple leagues adds valuable versatility to the attack.
Myrto Uzuni.playingStyle: Quick, intelligent forward who excels at finding space in behind defenses, making clever runs off the shoulder of defenders, and finishing with clinical efficiency when chances arrive
keyStrengths: Pace and intelligent movement off the ball
Versatility to play across the front line
Myrto Uzuni.worldCup2026Role: Versatile attacking option who can play on the wing or as a striker; his goal-scoring record and adaptability make him a valuable squad member for different tactical approaches
Myrto Uzuni.notableFact: Became famous for his iconic celebration and was one of the top scorers in Hungarian football with Ferencvaros before his move to MLS, consistently proving his goal-scoring credentials

Jasir Asani.bio: A skilful right winger with a deadly left foot, Asani has built a reputation as one of Albania's most creative wide players. His dribbling, crossing, and eye for goal from the right flank have made him a consistent threat in the Albanian attack throughout their World Cup qualifying campaign.
Jasir Asani.playingStyle: Skilful, left-footed right winger who cuts inside to create shooting opportunities, delivers dangerous crosses with his weaker foot, and uses close control to beat defenders in tight spaces
keyStrengths: Left-footed quality cutting in from the right
Jasir Asani.worldCup2026Role: Right wing option providing creativity and goal threat; his ability to cut inside on his left foot and create chances adds an important tactical variant to Albania's attack
Jasir Asani.notableFact: Has scored crucial qualifying goals for Albania and is known for his ability to produce important goals in big matches, making him a reliable performer on the international stage

Mirlind Daku.bio: A tall, powerful striker who has emerged as one of Albania's most exciting young forwards. Daku's combination of physical presence, aerial ability, and improving all-round game has made him a key figure in Albania's attack, and his prolific scoring in the Russian Premier League has boosted his reputation significantly.
Mirlind Daku.playingStyle: Tall, powerful center forward who excels in aerial duels, holds the ball up effectively to bring others into play, and uses his physicality to bully defenders while possessing a surprisingly deft touch
Mirlind Daku.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker whose physical presence gives Albania a focal point in attack; his ability to win aerial duels and hold up the ball allows Albania to build attacks and bring wingers into dangerous positions
Mirlind Daku.notableFact: Has become one of the most prolific Albanian strikers in recent years and drew attention at Euro 2024 for his passionate performances, though he also courted controversy with his celebrations

Armando Broja.bio: Born in England to Albanian parents, Broja is a powerful, explosive striker who came through Chelsea's academy before establishing himself as one of the most exciting young forwards in English football. His pace, physicality, and finishing ability have made him Albania's most high-profile attacking player and a genuine goal threat at the international level.
Armando Broja.playingStyle: Explosive, powerful striker with blistering pace, direct running at defenders, strong physical presence, and the ability to score spectacular goals with both power and precision
Armando Broja.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking player whose pace and power terrify defenders; his ability to run channels, hold the ball up, and finish clinically makes him Albania's most dangerous offensive weapon on the counter-attack
Armando Broja.notableFact: Came through Chelsea's academy alongside some of the best young talent in English football and chose to represent Albania internationally, becoming one of the country's most prized assets

Rey Manaj.bio: A well-traveled striker who has experienced football across Italy, Spain, and Turkey. Manaj's intelligence, positioning, and technical ability in the final third have made him one of Albania's most reliable goal scorers, with his decade-plus international career providing invaluable experience to the squad.
Rey Manaj.playingStyle: Intelligent, technically gifted striker with excellent positioning inside the box, good link-up play, and the ability to score different types of goals including headers, volleys, and placed finishes
keyStrengths: Intelligent movement and positioning in the box
Link-up play and combination with teammates
Rey Manaj.worldCup2026Role: Experienced attacking option who can play as a lone striker or alongside a partner; his goal-scoring record for Albania and tactical intelligence make him a valuable rotation option
Rey Manaj.notableFact: Is Albania's joint-top scorer in the current generation and has scored goals across multiple European leagues including Serie A and La Liga, showcasing his adaptability

Indrit Tuci.bio: A young striker developing in Turkish football who has shown promise with his physical presence and goal-scoring instincts. Tuci's inclusion in the World Cup squad reflects Albania's depth in the forward positions and their investment in blooding young talent alongside experienced campaigners.
Indrit Tuci.playingStyle: Tall, physical striker who uses his height and strength to compete aerially, hold the ball up for teammates, and create space for others through his willingness to make selfless runs
Indrit Tuci.worldCup2026Role: Young forward depth option who can provide a physical presence off the bench; his aerial threat makes him a useful option when Albania need to change their attacking approach
Indrit Tuci.notableFact: Has been developing his game in the Turkish Super Lig, gaining valuable experience in a competitive league that has produced many talented strikers over the years

Naser Aliji.bio: A veteran left-back who has been a loyal servant to Albanian football both domestically and internationally. Aliji's experience, defensive reliability, and understanding of the national team setup make him a valuable squad member who can be called upon when needed.
Naser Aliji.playingStyle: Experienced, defensively solid left-back who prioritizes positional discipline, reliable tackling, and providing consistent cover on the left side of defense
keyStrengths: Understanding of the national team system
Naser Aliji.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup left-back providing depth and squad stability; his knowledge of Albanian football's tactical approach makes him a dependable option if called upon
Naser Aliji.notableFact: Has been a consistent presence in Albanian domestic football and the national team setup, contributing to the nation's rise from minnows to World Cup qualifiers over the past decade
